name: Professor Stefan Sperl
title: Emeritus Professor of Arabic and Middle Eastern Studies; Professorial Research Associate
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
biography: Stefan Sperl studied Arabic at Oxford and the American University in Cairo and did his postgraduate research at SOAS.
research_interests: Arabic Literature Classical and Modern; Comparative Literature; Qur’an and Hadith Studies; Islamic Art; Sufism and Neoplatonism; Refugee and Exile Studies
